title: Rename device - new name on the Support device list
scenario: Device rename in Poly Studio Mobile app is not reflected in the Support device list under Menu/Support
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Note the current device name shown in the Support device list.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Tap the device name field and rename the device (e.g., change to "My Poly Headset").
Tap Save or confirm the rename.
Observe the device name displayed in the Support device list.
expected: The Support device list should display the new device name (e.g., "My Poly Headset") after renaming.
